workflowName: Customer logs in from Home page
preconditions: User starts from the Home page
Valid customer credentials exist for successful authentication scenarios

testCases.title: Open login page from Home page using profile button navigation
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Click the person/profile button on the Home page
Observe the displayed login screen
testCases.expectedResult: The application opens the Login page within the single page application flow and displays the Username input field, Password input field, and Login button without navigating to a separate direct login URL.

testCases.title: Verify login page UI elements are visible and interactive after navigation from Home page
steps: Navigate to the Home page
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page
Verify the Username input field is visible
Verify the Password input field is visible
Verify the Login button is visible and clickable
testCases.expectedResult: The Username field accepts text input, the Password field accepts masked input, and the Login button is enabled and clickable after the Login page is opened.

testCases.title: Login successfully with valid username and valid password
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the Username field
Enter a valid password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication succeeds, the Login page is dismissed, and the application transitions to an authenticated user state with protected account functionality accessible.

testCases.title: Reject login with invalid username and valid password
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter an invalid username into the Username field
Enter a valid password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, a visible login failure message is displayed, no authenticated session is created, and the Login page remains displayed with the Login button still available.

testCases.title: Reject login with valid username and invalid password
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the Username field
Enter an invalid password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, a visible authentication error message is displayed, the user remains on the Login page, and no redirect to an authenticated area occurs.

testCases.title: Reject login when both username and password are invalid
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter an invalid username into the Username field
Enter an invalid password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The login attempt is rejected, a login failure message is displayed, the Login page remains active, and the user is not granted authenticated access.

testCases.title: Validate required field behavior when Login is clicked with both fields empty
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Leave the Username field empty
Leave the Password field empty
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: Visible required field validation feedback is displayed for both Username and Password fields, authentication is not attempted, and the user remains on the Login page.

testCases.title: Validate required Username field when Password is entered
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Leave the Username field empty
Enter a password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: A visible required validation message is displayed for the Username field, the login request is blocked, and the Login page remains displayed without authentication.

testCases.title: Validate required Password field when Username is entered
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter a username into the Username field
Leave the Password field empty
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: A visible required validation message is displayed for the Password field, the login request is not submitted successfully, and the Login page remains visible.

testCases.title: Verify password characters are masked while typing
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Click inside the Password field
Type a password value into the Password field
Observe the displayed characters during entry
testCases.expectedResult: Every typed password character is visually masked during input entry and the actual password text is not readable on screen.

testCases.title: Verify login behavior with leading and trailing spaces in Username and Password fields
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username with leading and trailing spaces into the Username field
Enter a valid password with leading and trailing spaces into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application processes the values consistently according to implemented business rules, returns a stable authentication outcome, and does not display broken formatting, script errors, or inconsistent validation behavior.

testCases.title: Validate behavior when Username field contains only whitespace characters
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter only space characters into the Username field
Enter a valid password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The Username value is treated as invalid or empty input, authentication does not proceed successfully, visible validation or authentication feedback is displayed, and the Login page remains open.

testCases.title: Validate behavior when Password field contains only whitespace characters
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the Username field
Enter only space characters into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The Password value is rejected as invalid or empty input, the user is not authenticated, visible validation or authentication feedback is displayed, and the Login page remains visible.

testCases.title: Verify login failure when credentials are pasted into the fields with invalid values
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Paste an invalid username into the Username field
Paste an invalid password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The pasted invalid credentials are accepted as input values, authentication fails, a visible error message is displayed, and the Login page remains displayed without creating an authenticated session.

testCases.title: Verify successful login when valid credentials are pasted into input fields
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Paste a valid username into the Username field
Paste a valid password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The pasted credentials are processed successfully, the user is authenticated, the Login page closes or redirects away, and authenticated application functionality becomes accessible.

testCases.title: Verify application stability when Login button is clicked repeatedly with valid credentials
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the Username field
Enter a valid password into the Password field
Click the Login button multiple times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: The application processes only a single successful authentication flow, does not create duplicate authenticated sessions, and does not display duplicate loading states, repeated redirects, or unstable UI behavior.

testCases.title: Verify Username field accepts long input without UI corruption
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter an unusually long value into the Username field
Enter a password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The Username field accepts the long input without breaking page layout, overlapping controls, or crashing the application, and the login attempt returns a controlled validation or authentication response.

testCases.title: Verify Password field accepts long input while remaining masked
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the Username field
Enter an unusually long password value into the Password field
Observe the password display
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: All password characters remain masked while entering long input values, the page layout remains stable, and the application returns a controlled authentication response after submission.

testCases.title: Verify Username field handling of special characters
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter special characters into the Username field
Enter a password into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The application safely handles unsupported or unexpected Username characters, rejects invalid authentication input when appropriate, and does not expose stack traces, rendering defects, or unhandled system errors.

testCases.title: Verify Password field handling of special characters during authentication
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page
Enter a valid username into the Username field
Enter a password containing special characters into the Password field
Click the Login button
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field accepts special characters while continuing to mask entered values, the login request is submitted normally, and the application returns a valid authentication response without UI or security issues.
